title: matthiola dichotoma
intro: Matthiola dichotoma, also known as the shepherds needle, is a biennial flowering plant in the mustard family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory problems, and acting as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. In herbal preparations, Matthiola dichotoma is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
